cards.title: SoftBank to invest €75B in French data centers
cards.body: SoftBank plans to develop and operate up to 5 gigawatts of additional data center capacity in France. The massive investment signals the company's commitment to AI infrastructure expansion.

cards.title: GitHub Copilot's token-based billing sparks developer backlash
cards.body: Microsoft's GitHub Copilot is shifting to paid token-based billing, ending its free golden age. Developers are expressing frustration over the new pricing model.

cards.title: Meta develops AI-powered pendant hardware
cards.body: Meta is making significant bets on AI-powered wearable hardware with a new pendant device. The move reflects the company's broader AI hardware ambitions.

cards.title: Google's Gemini Spark AI assistant proves useful
cards.body: Gemini Spark automates everyday tasks from inbox summaries to local event planning. However, questions remain about why Google created it as a separate product.

cards.title: Alternative browsers challenge Chrome and Safari dominance
cards.body: Multiple browser alternatives are emerging to compete with Chrome and Safari in 2026. These options offer new features and privacy-focused approaches.

cards.title: Coders embracing AI may face long-term risks
cards.body: While AI helps developers produce code faster, research suggests it may not produce better code. This could create problems for developers relying heavily on AI assistance.

cards.title: AI glossary demystifies overwhelming new terminology
cards.body: The rise of AI has created an avalanche of new terms and industry slang. A comprehensive glossary helps explain the most important words and phrases.

cards.title: AI psychosis plagues executive decision-making
cards.body: Box founder Aaron Levie warns that executives deciding AI can replace jobs often misunderstand those roles. ClickUp's 22% workforce cut for AI agents exemplifies this trend.

cards.title: Groq raises $650M following Nvidia partnership
cards.body: AI chip startup Groq is raising $650 million as it pivots toward AI inference optimization. The funding comes after Nvidia's $20 billion investment in the company.

cards.title: Cognition's Devin agent complements rather than replaces humans
cards.body: Cognition CEO Scott Wu clarifies that Devin, the successful AI coding agent, isn't designed to replace human programmers. The tool aims to enhance developer capabilities instead.

cards.title: XCENA bets AI's bottleneck is memory, not compute
cards.body: South Korean chip startup XCENA raised $135 million betting that memory, not compute power, is AI's real constraint. The company challenges conventional assumptions about AI infrastructure needs.

cards.title: Glean's revenue triples amid AI budget optimization focus
cards.body: Enterprise AI search startup Glean's annual revenue crossed $300 million as budget-cutting becomes a major selling point. The company tripled revenue despite competition from tech giants.

cards.title: Cloud infrastructure redesigned for AI agent traffic
cards.body: AWS, Cloudflare, and others are rebuilding internet infrastructure for machine-generated traffic from AI agents. The shift reflects the transition of AI from experiments to production systems.

cards.title: Asana acquires StackAI for no-code agent building
cards.body: Asana has acquired no-code agent-builder StackAI to expand its AI workflow capabilities. The integration strengthens Asana's suite of AI-powered productivity tools.

cards.title: Anthropic raises $65B, approaches $1T valuation
cards.body: Anthropic closed a $65 billion Series H funding round at $965 billion valuation in what could be its final private fundraise. The milestone positions the company for an anticipated IPO.

cards.title: AI token futures emerge as new commodity markets
cards.body: Major exchanges are designing derivative products around AI tokens as raw material inputs. AI tokens are increasingly viewed like oil, gold, or electricity in commodity markets.

cards.title: Github Copilot's Token-Based Billing Angers Developers
cards.body: Microsoft's Github Copilot is shifting to token-based billing, ending its free tier. Developers are expressing frustration over the new pricing model.

cards.title: Meta Develops AI-Powered Hardware Pendant
cards.body: Meta is making significant investments in AI-powered hardware devices. The pendant represents the company's broader push into AI-integrated wearables.

cards.title: Google's Gemini Spark AI Assistant Automates Daily Tasks
cards.body: Gemini Spark helps users with inbox summaries and event planning through AI automation. The 24/7 assistant proves useful, though its separate product status raises questions.

cards.title: AI Code Quality Concerns Despite Developer Adoption
cards.body: While AI helps developers code faster, research warns it may not produce better code. The long-term implications of AI-generated code quality remain unclear.

cards.title: Essential AI Terminology Guide for Everyone
cards.body: AI's rise has introduced countless new terms and technical jargon. This glossary breaks down critical AI vocabulary for better understanding.

cards.title: Box Founder Warns CEOs of 'AI Psychosis'
cards.body: Aaron Levie argues executives deciding AI replacements often don't understand actual job responsibilities. This disconnect is driving misguided AI workforce decisions.

cards.title: Groq Raises $650M Pivoting to AI Inference
cards.body: After Nvidia's $20B deal, AI chip startup Groq is securing $650M to focus on inference optimization. The shift reflects growing demand for refining AI model responses.

cards.title: Cognition's Devin Shouldn't Replace Human Coders
cards.body: Scott Wu, creator of Devin AI coding agent, clarifies it complements rather than replaces programmers. The tool is designed to augment human developers, not eliminate them.

cards.title: XCENA Chip Startup Raises $135M on Memory Bet
cards.body: South Korean chipmaker XCENA challenges conventional AI wisdom, arguing memory—not compute—is the bottleneck. The $135M funding backs this bold thesis on AI infrastructure.

cards.title: Glean's Revenue Triples on AI Budget Optimization
cards.body: Enterprise AI search startup Glean surpassed $300M annual revenue despite tech giant competition. Cost-cutting has become its primary selling point to enterprises.

cards.title: Internet Infrastructure Rebuilt for AI Agents
cards.body: AWS, Cloudflare, and others are redesigning cloud infrastructure for machine-generated traffic. AI agents are moving from experiments to production at scale.

cards.title: Asana Acquires StackAI for No-Code Agents
cards.body: Asana is integrating no-code agent-builder StackAI into its AI workflow suite. The acquisition strengthens Asana's AI-powered automation capabilities.

cards.title: Anthropic Closes $65B Series H Before IPO
cards.body: Anthropic raised $65B at a $965B valuation in what may be its final private round. The AI startup is preparing for a highly anticipated IPO.

cards.title: AI Token Futures Market Takes Shape
cards.body: Major exchanges are designing derivative products around AI tokens as computational assets. AI tokens are increasingly treated as raw material inputs like energy or bandwidth.

cards.title: Pope's Encyclical Addresses AI's Role in Society
cards.body: Pope Leo XIV's Magnifica Humanitas emphasizes that technology is never neutral. The encyclical calls for courage and solidarity in the AI age.

cards.title: Organizations Struggle with Agentic AI Adoption
cards.body: While 85% of organizations aim for AI agent deployment within three years, 76% lack supporting infrastructure. The gap between ambition and execution remains significant.

cards.title: AI Jobs Panic Lacks Concrete Evidence
cards.body: Despite widespread concerns, evidence of AI-driven white-collar job losses remains limited. A reality check on current AI employment hysteria.

cards.title: LLMs Believe False Statements Despite Warnings
cards.body: Research shows language models can be convinced of false information even with explicit disclaimers. The finding raises concerns about LLM reliability.

cards.title: Developer Injects Prompt Injection into Vibe Coders
cards.body: Fed up with vibe coders, a developer embedded data-nuking prompt injection in their code. The move highlights growing tension over AI code quality.

cards.title: Home Cleaning Startup Records Data for Robot Training
cards.body: A startup offers free home cleaning services in exchange for recording footage. The data trains robots and AI systems for household automation.
